holdings.infoBox: BKLG is an equity ETF with a total of 329 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.05%, Apple at 9.75%, Microsoft at 6.32%, Amazon.com at 5.14%, and Alphabet at 4.63%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon US Large Cap Equity Growth ETF (BKLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap companies with growth characteristics. The index begins with the 500 largest stocks and includes only the top 70% based on growth scores. BKLG was launched on Jun 22, 2026 and is issued by BNY Mellon.
infoTable: Solactive GFS United States 500 Growth Style Index
